title: Build a RESTful API for Products
description: Create an Express API for managing products with full CRUD.
problemStatement:
Create an Express API for a `products` resource. Each product has an `id`, `name`, `price`, and `category`. Use an in-memory array to store data.

Implement the following endpoints:
- `GET /products` – return all products.
- `GET /products/:id` – return a single product by ID, or 404 if not found.
- `POST /products` – create a new product. Accept JSON body with `name`, `price`, `category`. Generate a unique id (incrementing number). Return 201 with the created product.
- `PUT /products/:id` – fully replace a product. Return the updated product or 404.
- `PATCH /products/:id` – partially update a product. Update only provided fields.
- `DELETE /products/:id` – delete a product. Return 204 No Content.

Test all endpoints using Postman or curl.
hints: Store products in an array, with `id` as incrementing integer.
For PUT, require all fields; for PATCH, update only present fields.
expectedOutput: Working API with all CRUD operations.
